name: Play Doh Modeling Compound 10-Pack Case of Assorted Colors, Non-Toxic 2 oz. Cans, Back to School Gifts, Prizes, & Party Favors, Preschool Toys for Kids, Ages 2+ (Amazon Exclusive)
bullets: GREAT REFILL OR STARTER PLAY-DOH SET: Whether your child is just beginning to play with Play-Doh or if they need a refill for a Play-Doh playset, this colorful collection has got you covered!
SHAPING IMAGINATION: From building their own rainbow to mixing their own colors, this imagination toy for kids 2 years and up lets them explore their creativity
10 PLAY-DOH CANS: This Play-Doh set includes 2-ounce cans of red, orange, yellow, green, teal, blue, purple, pink, black, and white. Contains wheat

CREATIVE ACTIVITIES FOR KIDS: This arts and crafts toy is great for classroom activities, playdate activities, or solo play. A great gift for kids who enjoy playing with modeling clay or imaginative play toys
ORIGINAL PLAY-DOH QUALITY: A favorite since 1956, Play-Doh modeling compound is made primarily with wheat, water, and salt. It goes through rigorous testing so it’s always high quality and super fun
description: Add some color to your creations with this 10-pack of non-toxic Play-Doh modeling compound in cheerful and bright colors! Kids can make just about any creations they can imagine. It makes a great Play-Doh starter set, or makes a great addition to Play-Doh playsets (sold separately, subject to availability). Perfect for classroom activities, playdate activities, or solo play! Play-Doh modeling compound will brighten up playtime for kids ages 2 and up who love to create with arts and crafts toys like modeling clay. Hasbro, Play-Doh, and all related properties are trademarks of Hasbro.

reviews.name: K+S in STL
reviews.title: Cute Little Cans of Play Doh - Good Color Selection
reviews.body: There’s a reason Play Doh is still the go-to brand after all these years. Fun and safe. This set is packaged for shipping, not for retail shelves. Not the best price you can find, but pretty good with free shipping. 2oz cans are tiny, but not as tiny as the 1oz ones. 4oz seems standard for “full size” these days, so these cans are half sized. Old school cans (the chipboard ones with the metal…

reviews.name: Samantha
reviews.title: Good purchase
reviews.body: These are small but we like all the colors and we got them on sale

reviews.name: daniel
reviews.title: Unleashing Creativity with Play-Doh's 10-Pack Case of Colors
reviews.body: When it comes to finding activities that both entertain and educate my children, I always strive to give them experiences that not only spark their imagination but also enhance their developmental skills. That's why I was thrilled to discover the Play-Doh Modeling Compound 10-Pack Case of Colors, exclusively available on Amazon. This delightful set has quickly become a household favorite,…

reviews.name: Carolyn
reviews.title: Good price
reviews.body: Good range of colors and brought a smile to my little ones face. Good amount for the price. Nice quality of playdoh and they play with it a lot. Smaller tubs so easy to take with you so they play with it more often.
